author: abaybektursun
name: MC Dropout Ensembling Is Negative for Small LMs
blurb: MC Dropout (train with dropout, average K=16 softmax distributions at eval) does not improve BPB at 17M parameters. Tested dropout=0.30 (+0.005 BPB) and dropout=0.05 (+0.002 BPB). The deterministic single pass is strictly better. Sub-networks lack diversity at this scale.
technique_summary: MC Dropout: nn.Dropout in Block after attn+MLP, K=16 forward passes averaged at eval time
